website.verification_hint: Compare the live file with release.json on the website repository main branch. The file does not embed its own website commit.

authority_boundary: A log records what happened. A ZLAR receipt records what counted as authorized effect when action tried to become consequence.

claim_boundary.summary: Release-forward verifier diagnostics preservation while preserving the v3.4.20 verifier-kit diagnostic hardening and v3.4.19 recognition-contract digest boundary.
claim_boundary.evidence_threshold: v3.4.21 release checks pass with release-forward verifier diagnostics preservation; v3.4.21+ release-forward dry-run checks preserve zlar-verifier-kit-external-runner-diagnostics-v1.json and v3.4.19+ readiness, proof-smoke, and release-forward dry-run checks preserve installed-runtime-profile recognition-contract SHA-256 binding.
claim_boundary.safe_codex_wording: ZLAR can govern Codex CLI-invoked MCP tool calls when those MCP servers are routed through ZLAR.
non_claims: No hook, user, or machine configuration claim.
